title: Severe Storms Forecast for Charlotte Area
summary: The Charlotte area is bracing for severe storms, including damaging winds and potential tornadoes, starting Sunday evening.
charlotte_impact: Severe weather poses immediate risks to public safety and infrastructure, requiring preparedness and caution.

title: Fatal Shooting in Hickory: Murder Charges Filed
summary: A shooting in Hickory resulted in one death and two injuries. A suspect has been charged with murder and attempted murder.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities.

title: Fatal House Fire Under Investigation in Chesterfield County
summary: A house fire in Chesterfield County caused one fatality. State authorities are investigating the incident as a possible arson.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about fire safety and potential criminal activity within the community.

title: Woman Charged with Kidnapping in Lincoln County
summary: A woman has been charged with kidnapping after allegedly leaving Denver with her own children and another child who was not hers.
charlotte_impact: Involves child safety and legal ramifications, impacting families and the community.

title: Sycamore Brewing Reopening with New Name, Owner
summary: Sycamore Brewing is reopening under a new name, Club West Brewing, with a new owner taking over operations this weekend.
charlotte_impact: Represents a positive development for local business and community gathering spaces.

title: Stabbing Incident in East Charlotte
summary: One person was stabbed in east Charlotte and transported to the hospital with serious injuries, according to Medic.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about public safety and violent crime in the city.

title: Missing Anson County Teen Found Safe
summary: A 19-year-old missing from Anson County since March 10 has been found safe.
charlotte_impact: Relief for the family and community, highlighting the importance of missing persons resources.

title: Charlotte Airport Operational Despite Shutdown
summary: Charlotte Douglas Airport maintains normal operations with TSA staffing, despite the government shutdown and nationwide TSA pay issues.
charlotte_impact: Ensures continued travel and economic activity despite national political challenges.

title: Fatal Hit-and-Run on The Plaza: Police Seek Driver
summary: A 23-year-old woman was killed in a hit-and-run on The Plaza in Charlotte. Police are seeking the driver who fled on foot.
charlotte_impact: Tragic loss of life and a call for justice, emphasizing the need for responsible driving.

title: Pedestrian Critically Injured in South Charlotte Crash
summary: A pedestrian was hospitalized with life-threatening injuries after being struck by a vehicle in the 3900 block of South Tryon Street.
charlotte_impact: Highlights pedestrian safety concerns and the potential for serious traffic accidents.

title: Shooting Near Loyalty Inn: Residents Demand Closure
summary: Two people were shot near the Loyalty Inn in west Charlotte, marking the fifth violent incident in a year, prompting calls for the hotel's closure.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community concerns about safety and the impact of crime hotspots on neighborhoods.

title: NC Fire Leaders Warn of Growing Wildfire Threat
summary: Fire leaders warn that North Carolina faces a growing wildfire threat due to rising fire numbers and damage from Hurricane Helene.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness of environmental risks and the need for wildfire prevention and preparedness.

title: Sustain Charlotte Launches I-77 Alternatives Challenge
summary: Sustain Charlotte is challenging the I-77 South project, which Mecklenburg County officials say will impact greenways and parks.
charlotte_impact: Focuses on environmental sustainability and community impact of infrastructure projects.

title: New Traffic Signal Planned Near Fort Mill School
summary: A new traffic signal is planned near Catawba Ridge High School to address safety concerns.
charlotte_impact: Improves traffic safety and pedestrian access around schools.

title: Two Drivers Killed in Head-On Crash in Lancaster
summary: A head-on collision on Airport Road in Lancaster resulted in the deaths of two drivers.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of driving and the importance of road safety measures.
